# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "2.1"

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app1.example.com
        - https://app2.example.com
        - https://*.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
        - Accept
        - Origin
        - User-Agent
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Custom-Header
        - X-Response-Time
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true
      preflight_continue: false
    enabled: true

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: apikey
      hide_credentials: true
      anonymous: ""
      run_on_preflight: true
    enabled: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
      hour: 10000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      sync_rate: -1
      limit_by: consumer
      redis_host: redis
      redis_port: 6379
      redis_password: ""
      redis_database: 0
      redis_timeout: 2000
      redis_ssl: false
      redis_ssl_verify: false
    enabled: true

services:
  - name: example-service
    url: http://example-backend:8000
    routes:
      - name: example-route
        paths:
          - /api/*
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app1.example.com
                - https://app2.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - DELETE
              headers:
                - Content-Type
                - Authorization
              credentials: true
            enabled: true
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 500
              hour: 5000
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
            enabled: true

consumers:
  - username: example-consumer
    custom_id: "12345"
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 2000
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
        enabled: true
